Label: N/A
Issue: The document does not specify the total number of supported concurrent users for the system.
Suggestion: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: APAF-FR-01
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the telemetry data acquisition fails.
Suggestion: If the telemetry data acquisition fails, the system shall retry up to three times before alerting the administrator.

Label: APAF-FR-02
Issue: Does not specify the format or structure of the IDFS data sets.
Suggestion: The IDFS data sets shall be formatted according to the specifications outlined in the APAF Data System Interface Document.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: Does not specify the frequency of updates for the web-based displays.
Suggestion: The web-based displays shall be updated every 15 minutes with the most current ASPERA-3 data.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: Does not specify the method of password protection for the web server.
Suggestion: The web server shall use two-factor authentication for password protection.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: Does not specify the archival system to be used for the UNIX-based APAF system production computer.
Suggestion: The archival system shall use a RAID-5 configuration for data redundancy and integrity.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: Does not specify the method of electronic distribution for the IDFS data.
Suggestion: The IDFS data shall be distributed via secure FTP to the ASPERA-3 Co-I’s.

Label: APAF-DR-02c
Issue: Does not specify the process for validating the data before depositing it in the NASA PDS.
Suggestion: The data shall undergo a validation process that includes automated checks and manual review by the data team before depositing in the NASA PDS.

Issue: Does not specify any software quality metrics or standards to be followed.
Suggestion: The software shall adhere to ISO/IEC 25010 standards for software quality, including reliability, maintainability, and usability.

Issue: Does not specify any training requirements for users and operators of the APAF data system.
Suggestion: A training program shall be developed to ensure that all users and operators are proficient in using the APAF data system.
